expectedClassifications.testName: Gmail email, flow tenant, member sign in google, access denied
expectedClassifications.notes: SSO Google OAuth flow -- no structural equivalent in Firebase emulator suite. Different auth mechanism entirely.

expectedClassifications.testName: 8flow email sign in as admin, okta sso
expectedClassifications.notes: OKTA SAML SSO flow -- no structural equivalent in emulator suite. Target uses signInWithEmulator, not SSO redirects.

expectedClassifications.testName: 8flow email, sign in as admin, one login sso
expectedClassifications.notes: OneLogin SSO flow -- same mechanism gap as OKTA. The emulator auth tests verify auth boundaries, not provider-specific flows.
